name: movement-travel
description: Tests multi-tick army transit via a 2-hop path. Nation A (el_salvador) moves its army to mexico_yucatan. Path: el_salvador‚Üíguatemala‚Üímexico_yucatan. Per-leg costs: el_salvador‚Üíguatemala (mountainous, √ó1.5‚Üíceil=2 ticks first leg), then guatemala‚Üímexico_yucatan (coastal, 1 tick). Total=3 ticks. At T2 the army is still at el_salvador (in transit, first leg not yet complete). mexico_yucatan is NOT adjacent to el_salvador ‚Üí TrueFog. At T4 the army arrives at mexico_yucatan (first leg arrives at guatemala at T3, second leg arrives at mexico_yucatan at T4) ‚Üí Clear. assert_visibility checks: T2 mexico_yucatan=TrueFog, T4 mexico_yucatan=Clear.
